# LLM Request Body Format

## Anthropic

The Anthropic Messages API uses a JSON request body with the following structure:

- `model`: the model identifier (required)
- `messages`: array of conversation turns (required)
- `max_tokens`: maximum tokens to generate
- `system`: optional system prompt (string or block array)

## OpenAI

The OpenAI Chat Completions API uses a similar structure with `model` and `messages` fields, plus additional fields like `response_format` and `tool_calls`.
